PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jesko Onken in Propria Persona.

Mr. Onken reported that the will has been filed, lodged and admitted in Germany, that the proceedings are quite different there, that he filed a transcript of proof that it was filed in Germany, that there are no further steps to be taken in Germany, that there is no other document to provide proof and that the will is court issued, court certified and has an Apostille attached. The petition for letters of administration with will annexed was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Lopes. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
